name: The Churn Edge
descriptionSeed: The margin where the Unspooling starts unspooling. Things here are mostly reliable, which is the local way of saying that they are usually reliable, which is the local way of saying that they were reliable the last time anyone checked. The Churnfolk find the surface world's expectation of consistency charmingly superstitious.
encounterFlavor: Edge-folk who are cheerful about the unreliable; a road that was here yesterday; someone from the ordered world having a very bad afternoon.
questSeeds: The Edge is creeping outward and the Churnfolk think this is fine and interesting
Something reliable has appeared in the Churn, and it should not have, and it is not moving
worldPosNote: A place people pass through or live in — pulled inward of its Reach's pole. (SNG-180: authored position — WHERE it sits. Independent of axisVector, which is WHAT it is; a bastion is where the two disagree.)
